title.rendered: Glow in the Dark Mini Golf Lights up Veterans Park in Minnesota!

content.rendered:
For Immediate Release:
May 6, 2025

Richfield, MN – Wheel Fun Rentals Veterans Park Mini Golf has partnered with Richfield Parks and Recreation to offer an unforgettable evening of neon excitement at Veterans Park! This exciting event features Glow in the Dark Mini Golf—an immersive experience that transforms the night into a dazzling playground for families and friends.

Event Highlights:

What: Glow in the Dark Mini Golf – Enjoy an exhilarating mini golf course bathed in vibrant neon lights and captivating backlighting, creating a uniquely memorable nighttime adventure.

When: May 9th, May 10th, May 16th, May 17th

Time: 7:00 PM – 9:00 PM

Where: Veterans Memorial Park, 6335 Portland Ave, Richfield, MN 55423

Cost: $8 per person

In addition to the mini golf excitement, guests will enjoy an inflatable slide, lively music, and delicious concessions—ensuring there is fun for everyone.

Rodney Knight, owner of Wheel Fun Rentals, shared, “We are thrilled to partner with Richfield Parks and Recreation to bring our community together for a night of neon brilliance and fun. Join us for an unforgettable experience at Veterans Park where every moment shines bright!”

Pre-registration online is strongly recommended to secure your spot; walk-up registration with cash payment will be available as space permits. To pre-register for the event, visit wheelfunrentals.com/richfield-glow-golf or call (612) 799-8614 with questions or for more information.

For current hours of operation, available rentals, and more information about Wheel Fun Rentals at Veterans Memorial Park, visit wheelfunrentals.com/richfield.

###

Media Contact:  Rodney Knight  •  (612) 799-8614 •  wheelfunrentals@msn.com

 

About Wheel Fun Rentals
Founded in 1987, Wheel Fun Rentals started with four wheel Surrey cycles, evolved into specialty bike rentals and bike tours, and now offers recreational rentals of all kinds from more than 100 outlets in 16 states.  Specializing in unique bikes and tours, Wheel Fun Rentals has been offering clean, healthy family fun and affordable outdoor entertainment to nearly 3 million customers annually from city and state parks, resorts, and retail outlets through corporate locations and franchised territories. For more information about Wheel Fun Rentals please visit www.wheelfunrentals.com or call 805-650-7770. Follow Wheel Fun Rentals: @WheelFunRentalsOfficial and @WheelFunBend on Facebook, @WheelFunRentalsOfficial on Instagram, and @WheelFunRentals on Twitter.
